Attributes.Name: Administrator
Attributes.Description: Affects how quickly tasks are completed.

Attributes.Name: Figurehead
Attributes.Description: Influences staff morale, player happiness, and media interactions.

Attributes.Name: Savant
Attributes.Description: Determines the accuracy and depth of scouting reports.

Attributes.Name: Nomad
Attributes.Description: Affects the ease of finding transfer targets and staff.

Attributes.Name: Dealmaker
Attributes.Description: Improves success in transfer and contract negotiations.

Attributes.Name: Statto
Attributes.Description: Impacts the effectiveness of using data and analytics in decisions.

Attributes.Name: Ployglot
Attributes.Description: Improves communication with international players, staff, and media.

Attributes.Name: Strategist
Attributes.Description: Enhances the ability to plan long-term objectives and set club direction.

Attributes.Name: Financier
Attributes.Description: Improves the management of the club's finances and budgeting.

Attributes.Name: Motivator
Attributes.Description: Boosts player and staff motivation, increasing overall performance.
